session.name: MPI-208 Foundation batch (B1-A/B/C + R31) implementation + live verify

goal.original: Continue MPI-208 — generation queue refactor (cue/loop/stop/dual-engine state machine). Replace patch-over-patch cue/stop/status with a single owned generationStore state machine.
goal.summary: Foundation batch (B1-A generationStore + tests, B1-B SSE engine tagging/merge, B1-C engineOverride + R31 selector) is COMPLETE and live-verified in the Electron app, but UNCOMMITTED. Foundation is disjoint scaffolding — the store is NOT yet wired into the live generation path. Next: Phase 2 wires commandExecutor onto the store with cancellation tokens + engine-filtered SSE.

B1-C engineOverride first-class state + effectiveEngine() helper — live-proven toggle flips override

R31 selector-swaps-local (cross-fence: modelRegistry.js 4 gates -> effectiveEngine(); shell.js re-sync on engineOverride change; done AFTER MPI-209 committed) — live-proven local(10 models) vs remote(2) via /comfy/models/check-local

Phase 4: UI derived from store (statusBar, PromptBox, QueuePanel, blocks)

Two follow-ups to card separately (NOT MPI-208 scope): (1) remote gen fails at comfyController.js:470 WS-ready gate ~15s timeout — pre-existing, reproducible; (2) periodic syncModelInstalled poll every ~6.5s while remote-connected — pre-existing, possibly wasteful.

next_action.description: Implement Phase 2: rework js/services/commandExecutor.js generation path (runCommand :866+). Register the job in generationStore at entry; resolve engine+arch ONCE and FREEZE on the job record (move existing :886-901 logic in); add abort-token checks at each await boundary (ensureServerRunning, hot-store ensure, remote upload, prompt POST) — aborted = transition 'cancelled', NO prompt POST, no orphan listener; replace the _modelInitializing closure with job phase:'loading' driven ONLY by SSE frames where frame.engine === job.engine (and promptId when present); emitSamplingStart gate reads job phase; cache-hit path (R25) transitions via store; exec.cancel() delegates to store.cancel(jobId). PRESERVE _needsPathHeal (MPI-141/198), hot-store best-effort (R24), _reconcileFromHistory replay (MPI-203) — reconcile now ALSO settles the store job. Verify: unit — token abort before ACK => no /prompt POST (mock fetch, assert). Live — local gen Stop during 'LOADING MODEL' => logs/app.log shows interrupt, NO later prompt POST for that job, store job terminal 'cancelled', next cue runs clean.

key_decisions: Foundation ran via mpi-execute-parallel (3 disjoint workers) — plan-sanctioned for the B1 batch ONLY. Phases 2-5 are sequential by dependency; do NOT parallelize them.

generationStore uses a factory createGenerationStore({emit, logger}) for Node testability PLUS a real singleton wired to Events.emit + clientLogger. generation-store:changed is NOT yet in MpiEventMap (fence forbade editing js/events.js) — Phase 2/4 integrator should add it.

Store transition table: cancelling is an OVERLAY boolean, NOT a phase. cancel() = hard stop (abort token + frozen-interrupt callback + immediate phase->CANCELLED terminal). settle()=advance() is the late-settle path: a job kept in a non-terminal phase with cancelling=true can still advance to done (R09 output-saves) — the executor chooses which in Phase 2.

R31 fix rides existing wiring: shell.js re-runs syncModelInstalled() on engineOverride change -> repopulates dep-status cache -> emits models:checked -> sets s_installedModelIds -> MpiGalleryBlock's existing s_installedModelIds watcher rebuilds installedAllModels + setModelList. No MpiGalleryBlock edit was needed.

R31 endpoint routing: syncModelInstalled hits /comfy/models/check-local (the MPI-74 force-local endpoint) when remoteEngineClient.isRemote() && effectiveEngine()==='local'; else /comfy/models/check (which forks to Pod when remote-active).

B1-A test flattened from tests/generation-store/ subdir to flat tests/generation-store.test.cjs — repo convention (every sibling is flat *.test.cjs) AND node --test <dir>/ breaks under Node v24 (treats trailing dir as a module to load => MODULE_NOT_FOUND). Run tests directly: node --test tests/generation-store.test.cjs.
constraints: scalable-foundation project mode — full guardrails, no prototype shortcuts.
Shared git tree — commit by explicit pathspec (git commit --only <paths>), NEVER git add -A / git add . . Push stays user-authorized. Foundation is NOT committed yet.
MUST NOT change: ComfyUI injection contract, workflow compile, hot-store, LoRA upload, model install/download pipeline, project.json writes. Interface points only.

MPI-165 engine-split contract: engine resolved ONCE per gen AFTER remoteEngineClient.refresh(); never let two consumers call isRemote() independently. Phase 2 must FREEZE engine+arch on the job record.

Preserve (do NOT silently drop): MPI-141/198 path heal (_needsPathHeal), MPI-156 keepalive+transition self-heal, MPI-157 stop-all, MPI-179 mirror refresh, MPI-194 hot-store, MPI-203 history replay, MPI-206 model re-sync.
Rule-file + docs updates (events/state/component-*/comfy_engine, docs/generation-queue.md) are staged for Phase 5 and REQUIRE explicit user permission (CLAUDE.md cardinal rule 3).

MPI-209 (arch install toggles) is COMMITTED (f8f65da, 3c755fc, e2c532b) — registry is now stable, no live-edit collision. It left the 4 modelRegistry engine gates on isRemote(); R31 flipped them to effectiveEngine().

js/components/Organisms/MpiPromptBox/MpiPromptBox.js (B1-C — toggle writes engineOverride + keeps _runLocal mirror; state:changed rebuild)

resume_prompt: You are resuming MPI-208 (generation queue refactor) in Cubric Vision on branch RunPod. Read .agents/mpi-kanban/state/handoffs/a3df8fb2-1964-439f-b651-8bdff803e00e.json and use mpi-continue to pick up. Foundation batch (B1-A generationStore.js + tests, B1-B SSE engine tagging/merge, B1-C engineOverride + R31 model-selector swap) is COMPLETE and live-verified in the Electron app but UNCOMMITTED — the store is scaffolding, NOT yet wired into the live generation path. Your next action is Phase 2: rework js/services/commandExecutor.js runCommand (:866+) to register each generation as a job in generationStore, freeze engine+arch on the job record, add abort-token checks at every await boundary (aborted => transition cancelled, NO /prompt POST), replace the _modelInitializing closure with job phase:'loading' driven only by SSE frames where frame.engine===job.engine, and make exec.cancel() delegate to store.cancel(jobId). Preserve _needsPathHeal (MPI-141/198), hot-store best-effort (R24), and _reconcileFromHistory replay (MPI-203). Verify with a unit test (token abort before ACK => no /prompt POST, mock fetch) and a live test (local gen Stop during LOADING MODEL => interrupt logged, no later prompt POST, store job terminal cancelled, next cue clean). Constraints: scalable-foundation mode, shared git tree (commit by explicit pathspec only, Foundation not committed yet), do NOT parallelize Phases 2-5, and do NOT change the ComfyUI injection/workflow/hot-store/install contracts. Two pre-existing follow-ups to card separately (NOT MPI-208): remote gen failing at comfyController.js:470 WS-ready gate, and a ~6.5s periodic syncModelInstalled poll while remote-connected.
